assertions.title: Clicking detection marker shows label popover

steps.expected: Chart loads with candlestick data and detection markers
steps.observed: Chart rendered with 251 markers on 5m TF, Mon Oct 20 day tab active

steps.action: Click detection marker via mouse coordinates (calculated from JS)
steps.expected: Popover appears with LABEL DETECTION title and 3 buttons
steps.observed: Popover appeared with 'Label Detection' title and three buttons: ✓ CORRECT, ✗ NOISE, ? BORDERLINE

assertions.title: Colored rings render for each label type

steps.expected: Green, red, yellow rings visible on chart
steps.observed: Three distinct colored rings visible at labeled detection positions on chart — green (CORRECT), red (NOISE), yellow (BORDERLINE)

steps.expected: VGTRingPrimitive active
steps.observed: JS eval confirms _vgtRingPrimitive exists and is attached to candleSeries

assertions.title: Label file saved to disk with correct schema

steps.action: After labeling 3 detections, check disk file
steps.expected: site/data/labels/2025-W43.json exists with correct JSON structure
steps.observed: File exists with 3 label entries, each containing: detection_id, primitive, timeframe, direction, label, forex_day, labeled_at

steps.expected: Page reloads, week picker shows 'Select a week...'
steps.observed: Page reloaded to initial state with empty state message

steps.expected: Labels reappear: ✓1 ✗1 ?1 Total:3
steps.observed: Label counts show '✓ 1 ✗ 1 ? 1 Total: 3', colored rings visible on chart

steps.action: With W43 selected (3 labels), switch to W42
steps.expected: W42 shows Total: 0 (no labels)
steps.observed: W42 loaded with '✓ 0 ✗ 0 ? 0 Total: 0', no colored rings visible

steps.expected: W43 shows ✓1 ✗1 ?1 Total: 3 with colored rings
steps.observed: Label counts restored to '✓ 1 ✗ 1 ? 1 Total: 3', three colored rings visible on chart

steps.action: Intercept download via JS monkey-patch on URL.createObjectURL
steps.expected: Download triggered on click
steps.observed: Download interceptor captured file

steps.expected: File named labels_2025-W43.json with 3 label entries
steps.observed: Filename: labels_2025-W43.json, content contains 3 label objects with correct schema (detection_id, primitive, timeframe, direction, label, forex_day, labeled_at)

evidence.downloadContentPreview: 3 label entries matching disk file contents

steps.expected: Panel slides in from right showing locked params
steps.observed: Lock panel slides in with 320px width, shows 'LOCKED PARAMETERS' section header

steps.expected: schema_version, instrument, per-primitive params displayed
steps.observed: Shows schema_version=1.0, instrument=EURUSD, then grouped primitives: Fvg (floor_threshold_pips=0.5), Swing_points (N.1m=5, N.5m=3, N.15m=2), Displacement (atr_period=14, combination_mode=AND, ltf/htf settings), plus OTE, Reference_levels, and all other primitives

steps.action: Verify Notes textarea and buttons present
steps.expected: Notes input, Record Lock button, Export Labels button
steps.observed: Textarea with placeholder 'Optional notes about this lock decision...', blue 🔒 Record Lock button, secondary 📥 Export Labels button

steps.action: Enter notes: 'Test lock record for VAL-UI-018 validation'
steps.expected: Notes text entered in textarea
steps.observed: Notes text visible in textarea

steps.expected: Button shows success feedback
steps.observed: Button briefly changed to '✓ Lock Recorded!' with teal background

steps.expected: site/data/lock-records/2025-W43.json exists with correct schema
steps.observed: File created with: week='2025-W43', params=(full locked params object with 11 primitives), notes='Test lock record for VAL-UI-018 validation', recorded_at=ISO timestamp

fileContent.notes: Test lock record for VAL-UI-018 validation

steps.expected: Page loads with dark theme, week picker visible
steps.observed: Page loaded, empty state shown

steps.expected: Chart renders with candles, markers, sessions
steps.observed: Chart rendered: 251 markers, candlestick data, session bands, day tabs for Oct 20-25

steps.action: Verify all data loaded via JS eval
steps.expected: candleData, detectionData, sessionData all present
steps.observed: All data objects populated, chart and candleSeries active

steps.expected: 3 previously saved labels restored
steps.observed: labelCount=3, rings rendered, label counts show ✓1 ✗1 ?1 Total:3

steps.expected: Download triggered with correct filename and content
steps.observed: labels_2025-W43.json downloaded with 3 entries

steps.expected: Lock record saved to disk with params and notes
steps.observed: Lock record file created with full locked params and notes

steps.expected: Index page loads with cards
steps.observed: Page loaded with 'ICT Primitive Threshold Calibration' title and card grid

steps.expected: Validation Mode card visible with Phase 3.5 badge
steps.observed: Card shows 'Validation Mode' with 'PHASE 3.5' badge, description: 'Browse detection results week-by-week across 6 months of real EURUSD data. Label detections and export ground truth.'

steps.expected: Navigate to validate.html
steps.observed: URL changed to http://localhost:8200/validate.html, page loaded with dark theme and week picker

steps.expected: HTTP 200
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned

steps.expected: Comparison interface loads independently
steps.observed: Full comparison interface rendered: Chart tab active with candlestick data, config selector (candidate_relaxed, current_locked), divergence navigator (9832 total), primitive buttons, day tabs, TF selector. Completely independent from Mode 3.5 on port 8200.

assertions.title: Label file on disk matches UI state

steps.action: Label 3 detections in UI (CORRECT, NOISE, BORDERLINE)
steps.expected: Labels saved to disk file
steps.observed: site/data/labels/2025-W43.json contains 3 entries

steps.action: Verify disk file matches UI label counts
steps.expected: File has same 3 labels shown in UI
steps.observed: File contains exactly: displacement_5m_2025-10-20T03:55:00_bear=CORRECT, displacement_5m_2025-10-20T05:50:00_bear=NOISE, displacement_5m_2025-10-20T07:05:00_bull=BORDERLINE — matches ✓1 ✗1 ?1 Total:3 in UI

steps.expected: Labels loaded from disk match what was saved
steps.observed: All 3 labels restored from disk, counts match

assertions.title: No stale state on week switch

steps.action: With W43 selected (3 labels), switch to W42
steps.expected: W42 shows zero labels, no colored rings
steps.observed: Label counts show '✓ 0 ✗ 0 ? 0 Total: 0', chart shows W42 data (Oct 13-17), no rings visible

steps.action: Verify W42 metadata different from W43
steps.expected: Different date range, day tabs, price levels
steps.observed: W42 shows date range 2025-10-13 → 2025-10-17, day tabs Mon Oct 13 through Sat Oct 18, different price pattern and detection counts

steps.expected: W43 labels restored, no W42 labels bleeding through
steps.observed: W43 shows '✓ 1 ✗ 1 ? 1 Total: 3' — only the original 3 labels, no stale data from W42

steps.expected: 2 weeks with detection counts
steps.observed: 2 weeks: W42 (9561 dets), W43 (9566 dets)

steps.action: Verify detection files exist and counts match
steps.expected: detections/{week}.json exists with matching count
steps.observed: W42: 9561 actual = 9561 manifest ✓, W43: 9566 actual = 9566 manifest ✓

steps.action: Verify candle files exist with all TFs
steps.expected: candles/{week}.json exists with 1m, 5m, 15m keys
steps.observed: Both weeks have candle files with ['1m', '5m', '15m'] keys

steps.expected: sessions/{week}.json exists
steps.observed: Both week session files present

steps.expected: File exists with schema_version and instrument
steps.observed: params/locked.json exists: schema_version=1.0, instrument=EURUSD

summary: Tested 14 assertions (VAL-UI-011–018 + VAL-CROSS-001–006): all 14 passed. Ground truth labeling system (VAL-UI-011 through VAL-UI-018) fully functional: click-to-label popover shows CORRECT/NOISE/BORDERLINE buttons, colored rings render (green/red/yellow), labels saved to disk with correct schema (detection_id, primitive, timeframe, direction, label, forex_day, labeled_at), labels persist across page reload and week switches, export downloads JSON file, lock panel displays all locked parameters with notes input, and record lock saves to disk with params and timestamp. Cross-area flows (VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-006) all pass: end-to-end flow works seamlessly, index.html Validation Mode card navigates to validate.html, Mode 1 on port 8100 operates independently from Mode 3.5 on port 8200, no stale state bleeds between week switches, and manifest entries exactly match files on disk.
